session.user:
Run these checks and report results: 1. uv run ruff check packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py 2. uv run ruff format --check packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py 3. uv run --package erk-mcp pytest packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py -v
Report all results.
session.assistant: I'll run these checks for the erk-mcp server files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py
Run ruff linting checks on server files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py
Check ruff formatting on server files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on server tests with verbose output

============================== 22 passed in 1.52s ==============================
session.assistant:
Perfect! All checks passed successfully.
## Summary

**2. Ruff Formatting**: passed - 2 files already formatted (no changes needed)
**3. Pytest**: passed - 22 passed in 1.52s - All tests in `packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py` passed successfully
